prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e734a0e8`.
codex_response:
Rule summary: the `0` frontiers partition the board into equal tiles; one tile contains the only non-`7` motif, and every tile whose marker cell is a lone internal `0` gets replaced by that exact motif tile. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint was consistent with the official examples and I used it as a starting hypothesis; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no `e734a0e8` entry.

Implementation is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e734a0e8/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e734a0e8/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e734a0e8/generator.py), and [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e734a0e8/helpers.py). I didn’t add any reusable primitive to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`; the task only needed local tile-splitting/composition helpers.

Validation passed end-to-end:
- Official examples: `pass e734a0e8: 3/3 official examples passed`
- Generated build: 1000 examples written to [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e734a0e8/task.json)
- Generated verification: `pass e734a0e8: 1000/1000 generated examples passed`

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e734a0e8/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e734a0e8/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e734a0e8/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e734a0e8/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e734a0e8/previews/preview_03.png). I checked a generated preview sheet visually; the samples stay in-family with the official tiled-copy pattern.
